name: worktree-guard
description: A PreToolUse safety hook that stops the classic git-worktree footgun: when your session is inside a .claude/worktrees/<name>/ worktree, it blocks Write/Edit/MultiEdit that targets the parent checkout by absolute path (the main copy you didn't mean to touch), while leaving the worktree's own files — and its own git dir, where tools like /dev-kit:ship keep run state — writable. Inert outside a worktree, and fail-open on any error.
